ddls:
CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "source_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was sourced */,
  "first_created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was first created */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* ID of the source of the article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the article */,
  "urgency" INTEGER /* Urgency level of the article (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "take_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the article in the feed */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the article (e.g., RTRS, NYT) */,
  "subjects" TEXT /* Subjects covered in the article (e.g., finance, business) */,
  "audiences" TEXT /* Audiences targeted by the article (e.g., investors, analysts) */,
  "body_size" INTEGER /* Size of the article body in bytes */,
  "company_count" INTEGER /* Number of companies mentioned in the article */,
  "headline_tag" TEXT /* Tag or category of the headline (e.g., PRESS DIGEST, FEATURE) */,
  "market_commentary" INTEGER /* Whether the article contains market commentary */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the news article */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES news_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security (e.g., stock, ETF) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the security at the given timestamp */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the security at the given timestamp */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_article_companies" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company mentioned in the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_article_market_data" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data point related to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_sources" (
  "source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each news source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the news source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_article_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user view */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the article */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article viewed */,
  "view_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the view */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_article_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_article_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_sentiment" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "sentiment_class" INTEGER /* Sentiment class of the article (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "sentiment_negative" REAL /* Negative sentiment score of the article */,
  "sentiment_neutral" REAL /* Neutral sentiment score of the article */,
  "sentiment_positive" REAL /* Positive sentiment score of the article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Overall sentiment score of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_novelty" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "novelty_count_12h" INTEGER /* Novelty count of the article in the last 12 hours */,
  "novelty_count_24h" INTEGER /* Novelty count of the article in the last 24 hours */,
  "novelty_count_3d" INTEGER /* Novelty count of the article in the last 3 days */,
  "novelty_count_5d" INTEGER /* Novelty count of the article in the last 5 days */,
  "novelty_count_7d" INTEGER /* Novelty count of the article in the last 7 days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)
